title: 10 best herbal essential oils for periodontal disease
description: Melaleuca alternifolia, also known as tea tree, essential oils helps with periodontal disease because of its potent antimicrobial properties. The oil's active compound, cineole, inhibits the growth of bacteria and fungi responsible for periodontal disease, reducing inflammation and preventing further infection. Additionally, tea tree oil's antiseptic properties help to reduce plaque and prevent the formation of tartar, making it an effective natural remedy for maintaining oral health a...
